input: translitere en adlam: La kul alif lam min harf, wa lakil alif min harfun, wa lamun harfun, wa min mun harfun.
target: 𞤂𞤢 𞤳𞤵𞤤 𞤢𞤤𞤭𞤬 𞤤𞤢𞤥 𞤥𞤭𞤲 𞤸𞤢𞤪𞤬, 𞤱𞤢 𞤤𞤢𞤳𞤭𞤤 𞤢𞤤𞤭𞤬 𞤥𞤭𞤲 𞤸𞤢𞤪𞤬𞤵𞤲, 𞤱𞤢 𞤤𞤢𞤥𞤵𞤲 𞤸𞤢𞤪𞤬𞤵𞤲, 𞤱𞤢 𞤥𞤭𞤲 𞤥𞤵𞤲 𞤸𞤢𞤪𞤬𞤵𞤲.
latin: La kul alif lam min harf, wa lakil alif min harfun, wa lamun harfun, wa min mun harfun.

input: translitere en adlam: Yani sabunatabiti e hadis nula adola salara salama, nula adola hadisi habbiri bededgita he said.
target: 𞤒𞤢𞤲𞤭 𞤧𞤢𞤦𞤵𞤲𞤢𞤼𞤢𞤦𞤭𞤼𞤭 𞤫 𞤸𞤢𞤣𞤭𞤧 𞤲𞤵𞤤𞤢 𞤢𞤣𞤮𞤤𞤢 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤪𞤢 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤥𞤢, 𞤲𞤵𞤤𞤢 𞤢𞤣𞤮𞤤𞤢 𞤸𞤢𞤣𞤭𞤧𞤭 𞤸𞤢𞤦𞤦𞤭𞤪𞤭 𞤦𞤫𞤣𞤫𞤣𞤺𞤭𞤼𞤢 𞤸𞤫 𞤧𞤢𞤭𞤣.
latin: Yani sabunatabiti e hadis nula adola salara salama, nula adola hadisi habbiri bededgita he said.

input: translitere en adlam: itadun nila ramedi muhammadunu aleyhi salatu wa salam,
target: 𞤭𞤼𞤢𞤣𞤵𞤲 𞤲𞤭𞤤𞤢 𞤪𞤢𞤥𞤫𞤣𞤭 𞤥𞤵𞤸𞤢𞤥𞤥𞤢𞤣𞤵𞤲𞤵 𞤢𞤤𞤫𞤴𞤸𞤭 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤼𞤵 𞤱𞤢 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤥,
latin: itadun nila ramedi muhammadunu aleyhi salatu wa salam,

input: translitere en adlam: Al hasana tu bihashiri amsa liha.
target: 𞤀𞤤 𞤸𞤢𞤧𞤢𞤲𞤢 𞤼𞤵 𞤦𞤭𞤸𞤢𞤧𞤸𞤭𞤪𞤭 𞤢𞤥𞤧𞤢 𞤤𞤭𞤸𞤢.
latin: Al hasana tu bihashiri amsa liha.

input: translitere en adlam: Halferi woku baragi sapho.
translitere en adlam: Wa sallallahu ala sayedina Muhammadin wa ali wa sallam
target: 𞤏𞤢 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤸𞤵 𞤢𞤤𞤢 𞤧𞤢𞤴𞤫𞤣𞤭𞤲𞤢 𞤃𞤵𞤸𞤢𞤥𞤥𞤢𞤣𞤭𞤲 𞤱𞤢 𞤢𞤤𞤭 𞤱𞤢 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤥
latin: Wa sallallahu ala sayedina Muhammadin wa ali wa sallam

input: translitere en adlam: Fulani langa suratul kahaf, beya ful jodo hejito, o gondondom befala andugol eskedumdong kodja adung esunakunun yawori dundo.
target: 𞤊𞤵𞤤𞤢𞤲𞤭 𞤤𞤢𞤲𞤺𞤢 𞤧𞤵𞤪𞤢𞤼𞤵𞤤 𞤳𞤢𞤸𞤢𞤬, 𞤦𞤫𞤴𞤢 𞤬𞤵𞤤 𞤶𞤮𞤣𞤮 𞤸𞤫𞤶𞤭𞤼𞤮, 𞤮 𞤺𞤮𞤲𞤣𞤮𞤲𞤣𞤮𞤥 𞤦𞤫𞤬𞤢𞤤𞤢 𞤢𞤲𞤣𞤵𞤺𞤮𞤤 𞤫𞤧𞤳𞤫𞤣𞤵𞤥𞤣𞤮𞤲𞤺 𞤳𞤮𞤣𞤶𞤢 𞤢𞤣𞤵𞤲𞤺 𞤫𞤧𞤵𞤲𞤢𞤳𞤵𞤲𞤵𞤲 𞤴𞤢𞤱𞤮𞤪𞤭 𞤣𞤵𞤲𞤣𞤮.
latin: Fulani langa suratul kahaf, beya ful jodo hejito, o gondondom befala andugol eskedumdong kodja adung esunakunun yawori dundo.

input: translitere en adlam: La ra mbada maki aleyhi salatu wa salam, manqara harfem min kitabillahi falahubihi hasana.
target: 𞤂𞤢 𞤪𞤢 𞤃𞤦𞤢𞤣𞤢 𞤥𞤢𞤳𞤭 𞤢𞤤𞤫𞤴𞤸𞤭 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤼𞤵 𞤱𞤢 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤥, 𞤥𞤢𞤲𞤹𞤢𞤪𞤢 𞤸𞤢𞤪𞤬𞤫𞤥 𞤥𞤭𞤲 𞤳𞤭𞤼𞤢𞤦𞤭𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤸𞤭 𞤬𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤸𞤵𞤦𞤭𞤸𞤭 𞤸𞤢𞤧𞤢𞤲𞤢.
latin: La ra mbada maki aleyhi salatu wa salam, manqara harfem min kitabillahi falahubihi hasana.

input: translitere en adlam: Bismillahirrahmanirrahim. Alhamdulillahi rabbila ulamina wa sallallahu ala Sayyidina Muhammadin Wali wa Sallam.
target: 𞤄𞤭𞤧𞤥𞤭𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤸𞤭𞤪𞤪𞤢𞤸𞤥𞤢𞤲𞤭𞤪𞤪𞤢𞤸𞤭𞤥. 𞤀𞤤𞤸𞤢𞤥𞤣𞤵𞤤𞤭𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤸𞤭 𞤪𞤢𞤦𞤦𞤭𞤤𞤢 𞤵𞤤𞤢𞤥𞤭𞤲𞤢 𞤱𞤢 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤸𞤵 𞤢𞤤𞤢 𞤅𞤢𞤴𞤴𞤭𞤣𞤭𞤲𞤢 𞤃𞤵𞤸𞤢𞤥𞤥𞤢𞤣𞤭𞤲 𞤏𞤢𞤤𞤭 𞤱𞤢 𞤅𞤢𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤥.
latin: Bismillahirrahmanirrahim. Alhamdulillahi rabbila ulamina wa sallallahu ala Sayyidina Muhammadin Wali wa Sallam.

input: translitere en adlam: bima na kuachu guldundun guldun, wudu muti wadugungu yirfa mamu kaha tido, wala wata ala aalam.
target: 𞤦𞤭𞤥𞤢 𞤲𞤢 𞤳𞤵𞤢𞤷𞤸𞤵 𞤺𞤵𞤤𞤣𞤵𞤲𞤣𞤵𞤲 𞤺𞤵𞤤𞤣𞤵𞤲, 𞤱𞤵𞤣𞤵 𞤥𞤵𞤼𞤭 𞤱𞤢𞤣𞤵𞤺𞤵𞤲𞤺𞤵 𞤴𞤭𞤪𞤬𞤢 𞤥𞤢𞤥𞤵 𞤳𞤢𞤸𞤢 𞤼𞤭𞤣𞤮, 𞤱𞤢𞤤𞤢 𞤱𞤢𞤼𞤢 𞤢𞤤𞤢 𞤢𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤥.
latin: bima na kuachu guldundun guldun, wudu muti wadugungu yirfa mamu kaha tido, wala wata ala aalam.

input: translitere en adlam: Ayon nuhida ekongu dibulbedu debeng ekarama koopeng.
target: 𞤀𞤴𞤮𞤲 𞤲𞤵𞤸𞤭𞤣𞤢 𞤫𞤳𞤮𞤲𞤺𞤵 𞤣𞤭𞤦𞤵𞤤𞤦𞤫𞤣𞤵 𞤣𞤫𞤦𞤫𞤲𞤺 𞤫𞤳𞤢𞤪𞤢𞤥𞤢 𞤳𞤮𞤮𞤨𞤫𞤲𞤺.
latin: Ayon nuhida ekongu dibulbedu debeng ekarama koopeng.

input: translitere en adlam: Quranatun jangata, heba halferi wotere baragi sapho.
target: 𞤗𞤵𞤪𞤢𞤲𞤢𞤼𞤵𞤲 𞤶𞤢𞤲𞤺𞤢𞤼𞤢, 𞤸𞤫𞤦𞤢 𞤸𞤢𞤤𞤬𞤫𞤪𞤭 𞤱𞤮𞤼𞤫𞤪𞤫 𞤦𞤢𞤪𞤢𞤺𞤭 𞤧𞤢𞤨𞤸𞤮.
latin: Quranatun jangata, heba halferi wotere baragi sapho.

input: translitere en adlam: Siyoti habbiri o jangadu awli stifta.
target: 𞤅𞤭𞤴𞤮𞤼𞤭 𞤸𞤢𞤦𞤦𞤭𞤪𞤭 𞤮 𞤶𞤢𞤲𞤺𞤢𞤣𞤵 𞤢𞤱𞤤𞤭 𞤧𞤼𞤭𞤬𞤼𞤢.
latin: Siyoti habbiri o jangadu awli stifta.

input: translitere en adlam: Jango kafi nyende jumon, maweta jumon, maenyalal jumongal, nuwadi baraji hewdi, alasubhana huwata waranti annaura, unjumadong hajimareku wunani, wala spanta paalam.
target: 𞤔𞤢𞤲𞤺𞤮 𞤳𞤢𞤬𞤭 𞤲𞤴𞤫𞤲𞤣𞤫 𞤶𞤵𞤥𞤮𞤲, 𞤥𞤢𞤱𞤫𞤼𞤢 𞤶𞤵𞤥𞤮𞤲, 𞤥𞤢𞤫𞤲𞤴𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤤 𞤶𞤵𞤥𞤮𞤲𞤺𞤢𞤤, 𞤲𞤵𞤱𞤢𞤣𞤭 𞤦𞤢𞤪𞤢𞤶𞤭 𞤸𞤫𞤱𞤣𞤭, 𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤧𞤵𞤦𞤸𞤢𞤲𞤢 𞤸𞤵𞤱𞤢𞤼𞤢 𞤱𞤢𞤪𞤢𞤲𞤼𞤭 𞤢𞤲𞤲𞤢𞤵𞤪𞤢, 𞤵𞤲𞤶𞤵𞤥𞤢𞤣𞤮𞤲𞤺 𞤸𞤢𞤶𞤭𞤥𞤢𞤪𞤫𞤳𞤵 𞤱𞤵𞤲𞤢𞤲𞤭, 𞤱𞤢𞤤𞤢 𞤧𞤨𞤢𞤲𞤼𞤢 𞤨𞤢𞤢𞤤𞤢𞤥.
latin: Jango kafi nyende jumon, maweta jumon, maenyalal jumongal, nuwadi baraji hewdi, alasubhana huwata waranti annaura, unjumadong hajimareku wunani, wala spanta paalam.

input: translitere en adlam: Hara idon mihawrali sunna karun tebite bina nila rasulallahu aleyhi wa sallam.
target: 𞤖𞤢𞤪𞤢 𞤭𞤣𞤮𞤲 𞤥𞤭𞤸𞤢𞤱𞤪𞤢𞤤𞤭 𞤧𞤵𞤲𞤲𞤢 𞤳𞤢𞤪𞤵𞤲 𞤼𞤫𞤦𞤭𞤼𞤫 𞤦𞤭𞤲𞤢 𞤲𞤭𞤤𞤢 𞤪𞤢𞤧𞤵𞤤𞤢𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤸𞤵 𞤢𞤤𞤫𞤴𞤸𞤭 𞤱𞤢 𞤧𞤢𞤤𞤤𞤢𞤥.
latin: Hara idon mihawrali sunna karun tebite bina nila rasulallahu aleyhi wa sallam.

input: translitere en adlam: Unu ati bejulude, sibegaini julude, wadundundun, haura mihawrali bindi kadu windi hinusteli,
target: 𞤓𞤲𞤵 𞤢𞤼𞤭 𞤦𞤫𞤶𞤵𞤤𞤵𞤣𞤫, 𞤧𞤭𞤦𞤫𞤺𞤢𞤭𞤲𞤭 𞤶𞤵𞤤𞤵𞤣𞤫, 𞤱𞤢𞤣𞤵𞤲𞤣𞤵𞤲𞤣𞤵𞤲, 𞤸𞤢𞤵𞤪𞤢 𞤥𞤭𞤸𞤢𞤱𞤪𞤢𞤤𞤭 𞤦𞤭𞤲𞤣𞤭 𞤳𞤢𞤣𞤵 𞤱𞤭𞤲𞤣𞤭 𞤸𞤭𞤲𞤵𞤧𞤼𞤫𞤤𞤭,
latin: Unu ati bejulude, sibegaini julude, wadundundun, haura mihawrali bindi kadu windi hinusteli,

input: translitere en adlam: Pular fulani langue africaine.
translitere en adlam: Imamu oba oba awo o jangadu awli stifta.
target: 𞤋𞤥𞤢𞤥𞤵 𞤮𞤦𞤢 𞤮𞤦𞤢 𞤢𞤱𞤮 𞤮 𞤶𞤢𞤲𞤺𞤢𞤣𞤵 𞤢𞤱𞤤𞤭 𞤧𞤼𞤭𞤬𞤼𞤢.
latin: Imamu oba oba awo o jangadu awli stifta.
